U 1824(3?), faff* 22 *pnt 2009 (v) *T.3TT. K 1860(3?), faff* 30 ^1^,2010 (vi) *T.3?T. tf. 1484(3?), farf* 30 ^T, 2011 (vii) *T.3?T. U 2202(3?), faff* 22 ftidH*, 2011 (viii) *T.37T.-*?. 2423(3?),faff* 21 3PSJ3R, 2011 (ix) *T.3TT. tf. 1022(3?), faff* 4 *$, 2012 3?k (x) *T.3ff.U 2754(3?), faff* 21 W*TC, 2012 I ,23 GI/2013 MINISTRY OF RURAL DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th January, 2013 S.O. 164(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 29 of the Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005 (42 of 2005), the Central Government on being satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to do so, hereby makes the following further amendments to Schedule I of the said Act, namely:— In the said Schedule, in paragraph IB, after clause (X Va), the following clause shall be inserted, namely:— "(xvb) construction of play fields". [No.L-I2055/I/2007-NREGA(16028)] RAJESH BHUSHAN, Jt. Secy. Note.— Schedule I of the Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Act, 2005 (42 of 2005) was first amended vide number S.O. 323(E), dated the 6th March, 2007 and subsequently amended vide the following numbers:— (i) S.O. 88(E), dated the 14th January, 2008 (ii) S.O. 1489(E), datedthe 18th June,2008 (iii) S.O. 3000(E), dated the 31 st December, 2008 (iv) S.O. 1824(E), dated the 22nd July, 2009 (v) S.O. 1860(E), datedthe30th July, 2010 (vi) S.O. I484(E),datedthe30thJune,20Il (vii) S.O. 2202(E), dated the 22nd September, 2011 (viii) S.O. 2423(E), dated the 21 st October, 2011 (ix) S.O. 1022(E), dated the4thMay,2012 and (x) S.O. 2754(E), dated the 21 st November, 2012.
